creator: giffunip@asme.org
text:
The new version of freefem has problems detecting out KDE port, the 
configure script is probably broken. Meanwhile a new mirror was found.

BTW, the freefem-3.4.tar.gz is smaller.

Fix: 

Cange the MASTER_SITE.
How-To-Repeat: ftp://ftp.inria.fr/INRIA/Projects/Gamma/freefem/
